allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix deployment: Enable clean slate and remove MDX frontmatter

- Enable dangerous-clean-slate in FTP deployment to clear old files
- Remove frontmatter from MDX file (was rendering as visible content)
- This will delete all server files and upload fresh build

BREAKING: This will clear ALL files in public_html before upload

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
